ddls:
CREATE TABLE "sales_data" (
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sales record */,
  "year" INTEGER /* The year for which the sales data is recorded */,
  "date" TEXT /* The exact date of the sale */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region */,
  "channel_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the channel */,
  "sales_units" REAL /* The number of units sold */,
  "price_per_unit" REAL /* The price per unit sold */,
  "revenue" REAL /* Total revenue generated from sales */,
  "gross_profit" REAL /* Gross profit from sales */,
  "gross_margin" TEXT /* Gross margin percentage */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency of the transaction */,
  "exchange_rate" REAL /* Exchange rate to convert to standard currency */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the sale */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_data_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES product_info ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_data_channel_id FOREIGN KEY ("channel_id") REFERENCES sales_channel ("channel_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_data_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES sales_regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_info" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the product */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the product */,
  "cost_price" REAL /* Cost price of the product */,
  "reorder_level" INTEGER /* Reorder level for the product */,
  "last_purchase_date" TEXT /* Last purchase date of the product */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the supplier */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric */,
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sales record */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region */,
  "channel_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the channel */,
  "yearly_growth" REAL /* Yearly growth rate of sales */,
  "margin_change" REAL /* Change in gross margin from the previous year */,
  "sales_target" REAL /* Sales target for the period */,
  "performance_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the performance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_performance_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES sales_regions ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_performance_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES product_info ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_performance_record_id FOREIGN KEY ("record_id") REFERENCES sales_data ("record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_performance_channel_id FOREIGN KEY ("channel_id") REFERENCES sales_channel ("channel_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pricing_strategies" (
  "strategy_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each pricing strategy */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product affected by the strategy */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region */,
  "channel_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the channel */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the pricing strategy */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the pricing strategy */,
  "adjustment_type" TEXT /* Type of pricing adjustment (e.g., discount, markup) */,
  "adjustment_value" REAL /* Value of the pricing adjustment */,
  "strategy_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the strategy */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("strategy_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pricing_strategies_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES product_info ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pricing_strategies_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES sales_regions ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pricing_strategies_channel_id FOREIGN KEY ("channel_id") REFERENCES sales_channel ("channel_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "financial_forecasts" (
  "forecast_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each financial forecast */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product being forecasted */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region */,
  "channel_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the channel */,
  "forecast_year" INTEGER /* The year for which the forecast is made */,
  "predicted_revenue" REAL /* Predicted revenue for the forecasted year */,
  "predicted_profit" REAL /* Predicted profit for the forecasted year */,
  "confidence_level" TEXT /* Confidence level of the forecast */,
  "forecast_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the forecast */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("forecast_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financial_forecasts_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES sales_regions ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financial_forecasts_channel_id FOREIGN KEY ("channel_id") REFERENCES sales_channel ("channel_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financial_forecasts_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES product_info ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_analysis" (
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market analysis */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product being analyzed */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region */,
  "channel_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the channel */,
  "year" INTEGER /* The year for which the market analysis is conducted */,
  "market_trend" TEXT /* General market trend */,
  "competitor_activity" TEXT /* Activity of competitors */,
  "consumer_behavior" TEXT /* Behavior of consumers */,
  "analysis_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the analysis */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analysis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_analysis_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES sales_regions ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_analysis_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES product_info ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_analysis_channel_id FOREIGN KEY ("channel_id") REFERENCES sales_channel ("channel_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales_regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sales region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the sales region */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the region is located */,
  "market_size" REAL /* Estimated market size for the region */,
  "region_manager" TEXT /* Manager responsible for the region */,
  "region_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales_channel" (
  "channel_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sales channel */,
  "channel_name" TEXT /* Name of the sales channel */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the sales channel */,
  "channel_manager" TEXT /* Manager responsible for the channel */,
  "channel_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the channel */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("channel_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales_team" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sales team */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region the team is responsible for */,
  "channel_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sales channel the team manages */,
  "team_leader" TEXT /* Name of the team leader */,
  "team_size" INTEGER /* Size of the sales team */,
  "team_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_team_channel_id FOREIGN KEY ("channel_id") REFERENCES sales_channel ("channel_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_team_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES sales_regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales_targets" (
  "target_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sales target */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region the target is set for */,
  "channel_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the channel the target is set for */,
  "year" INTEGER /* The year for which the sales target is set */,
  "sales_target" REAL /* The sales target in units or revenue */,
  "target_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the target */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("target_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_targets_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES sales_regions ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_targets_channel_id FOREIGN KEY ("channel_id") REFERENCES sales_channel ("channel_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory_management" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory record */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region the inventory is located in */,
  "current_stock" INTEGER /* Current stock level */,
  "reorder_threshold" INTEGER /* Threshold for reorder */,
  "last_reorder_date" TEXT /* Date of the last reorder */,
  "last_stock_check_date" TEXT /* Date of the last stock check */,
  "inventory_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the inventory */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_management_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES sales_regions ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_management_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES product_info ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "supply_chain" (
  "chain_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each supply chain record */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product */,
  "supplier_name" TEXT /* Name of the supplier */,
  "lead_time" INTEGER /* Lead time for supply */,
  "cost_per_unit" REAL /* Cost per unit from the supplier */,
  "supplier_contact" TEXT /* Contact information for the supplier */,
  "supplier_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the supplier */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("chain_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_supply_chain_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES product_info ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "promotion_campaigns" (
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each promotional campaign */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product the campaign is for */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region */,
  "channel_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the channel */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the campaign */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the campaign */,
  "campaign_type" TEXT /* Type of promotional campaign */,
  "budget" REAL /* Budget allocated to the campaign */,
  "campaign_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the campaign */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("campaign_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_promotion_campaigns_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES sales_regions ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_promotion_campaigns_channel_id FOREIGN KEY ("channel_id") REFERENCES sales_channel ("channel_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_promotion_campaigns_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES product_info ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user within the platform */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region the user is responsible for */,
  "channel_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the channel the user manages */,
  "user_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the user */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_channel_id FOREIGN KEY ("channel_id") REFERENCES sales_channel ("channel_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES sales_regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who generated the report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "generation_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "data_scope" TEXT /* Scope of data included in the report */,
  "report_file" TEXT /* File path to the report */,
  "report_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES user_access ("user_id")
)
